div1.entryFree: Annoy, vb. to molest, to harm, to hurt: she will not be --'d with suitors, Shr. I, 1, 189. one spark of evil that might a. my finger, H5 II, 2, 102. thorns that would a. our foot, H6B III, 1, 67. without --ing me, Caes. I, 3, 22. so far as to a. us all, II, 1, 160. what can from Italy a. us, Cymb. IV, 3, 34.
